name: agent-workflow-mcp
description: Multi-step workflow orchestration MCP server — define, execute, pause, resume, and monitor complex agent workflows with dependency resolution and retry policies
author: THRONE

tools.name: create_workflow
tools.description: Define a workflow with named steps, dependencies, and retry policies

tools.name: start_workflow
tools.description: Start executing a workflow, returns execution ID and ready steps

tools.name: complete_step
tools.description: Mark a step as completed/failed/skipped with output data

tools.name: get_workflow_status
tools.description: Get current status of a workflow execution with per-step details

tools.name: list_workflows
tools.description: List workflow definitions or executions with optional filtering

tools.name: cancel_workflow
tools.description: Cancel a running workflow and preserve completed work

resources.description: Currently active workflow executions with summary
Aggregate statistics (total workflows, success rate, avg duration)
